name: Performance - Response Time for Knowledge Base Query
description: Measures the response time for a general query that triggers the RAG pipeline (Azure AI Search + LLM) to ensure it meets performance requirements.
input: POST /agent/message with user_message: 'How do I reset my password?'
output: AgentResponse with success=True and a knowledge-based answer
success_criteria: Total response time is less than 3 seconds
response.response contains relevant answer or fallback message
